message:
fix: render DashboardCustomizer in EnterpriseLayout so Studio opens from sidebar (#9812)

The Enterprise sidebar already wired openAddCardModal via context, but no
DashboardCustomizer was rendered in the enterprise layout tree to respond
to the state change. The Studio panel only existed inside Dashboard.tsx
(main dashboard), so clicking "Add more..." or the FAB on /enterprise/*
pages set context state with no visible effect.

Adds DashboardCustomizer to EnterpriseLayout.tsx, reading isAddCardModalOpen
from the existing dashboard context. Fixes #9801.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
